function.name: execute_shell_command
function.description: Execute a command on the remote Linux VM via the shell API. Returns the command output. Only use commands listed in the available commands section of your briefing.

cmd.description: The shell command to execute on the VM.

function.name: sleep_seconds
function.description: Pause execution for a given number of seconds (max 180). Use this when you receive a ban response and need to wait before retrying.

seconds.description: Number of seconds to sleep (capped at 180).

function.name: submit_answer
function.description: Submit the ECCS-formatted confirmation code extracted from the firmware output to the hub for verification. Only call this when you have the actual confirmation code.

confirmation_code.description: The ECCS confirmation code output by cooler.bin.
